programme.desc: Jazmyn and Jaimee stick together against the rest of the house; the lies and violence weigh heavily on Melissa and Allison; a decision is made, sealing Olivia and Diamond's fate; the girls get ratchet after a night of partying.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Jealous of Kristina's friendship with Asia, Angela struggles to enjoy her own birthday; the girls go on a pub-crawl scavenger hunt for Angela's party; everyone has fun until the surprise arrival of new sisters and everything changes.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Jazmyn and Jaimee find allies in their new roommates and are ready as ever to flex their muscles; Angela's fate in the house is decided, after getting into it with a new housemate; Allison and Melissa contemplate their own departure.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Meet the parents, and witness real life growth with the Babicz sisters; some parents don't get along as well as others.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A raccoon infestation is only the most extreme on a long list of problems plaguing KC's Bar & Grill and its checked-out owner.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get identical twins with identical egos to see eye-to-eye if they are to curb a dangerous over-pouring problem and save RG's Lounge in Kansas City, MO.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon looks to re-establish a sense of unity at O'Banion's in Nebraska, where a binge-drinking owner has been usurped in a hostile takeover by his partners.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help the owner of an Omaha, NE, hookah bar whose money is going up in smoke thanks to his staff's frat-house ways.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The dysfunctional owners of the O Face Bar are so inexperienced and chaotic Jon doesn't even know if he wants to save their business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Ever since extended family members were put on the payroll at The Tailgate in Santa Clarita, CA, business has taken a nosedive.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Faced with a PDA-obsessed manager and an owner solely focused on his own retirement, the staff at Pat's Cocktails calls Jon for help.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Maria Menounos helps Jon scope out a bar whose owner sits around as her husband does all the work and her dad picks up the bill.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Katy, Texas, to save Bryant's Ice House, which is plagued by a bad reputation, an even worse location and a wild staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps Justin and Michael, a pair of strippers who own The End Zone bar in Houston, put aside their differences before they lose more than just their shirts.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon's crew gets caught in the middle of a massive brawl at a New York sports bar when the customers discover they're being served cheap booze at premium prices.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The customers call the shots at a rowdy Staten Island bar where they pour their own drinks and cook their own food, so Jon tries to help the owners retake control.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must deflate the ego of a Puerto Rican bar owner who berates his staff and sons as his bar sinks further into debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In order to save a failing Queens dive, Jon has to quell the raging tempers of three loudmouthed, firefighting brothers.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Heavyweight legends Frank Mir and Roy “Big Country” Nelson collide in a highly anticipated rematch from Mohegan Sun. While Phil “Mr. Wonderful” Davis, “Easy” Ed Ruth, “Rowdy” Bec Rawlings, and pro wrestler Jake Hager return to the cage.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Mohegan Sun Arena with an explosive night of fights. The Bellator Welterweight Grand Prix concludes in the main event as current Champion Rory MacDonald takes on the former Champ Douglas Lima in a winner-takes-all bout.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place from WinStar World Casino in Oklahoma as middleweight submission specialist John Salter meets Holland’s Costello van Steenis. And don’t miss former Strikeforce World Champion King Mo’s final fight as he takes on Andrew Kapel

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: AJ McKee takes on Derek Campos in the Quarter Finals of the Featherweight World Grand Prix. Then in the main event hometown hero, Ilima Lei MacFarlane defends her Flyweight belt against Kate Jackson.

programme.title: Bellator 237: Fedor vs Rampage
programme.desc: East meets West when Bellator MMA invades Tokyo with a stacked card that features MMA superstar Fedor Emelianenko and Rampage Jackson colliding in a long-awaited showdown. Also in action are Bellator stars Michael Chandler and Michael “MVP” Page.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Forum in LA. Darrion Caldwell takes on Adam Borics in the quarter-finals of the Featherweight World Grand Prix. In the main event, Julia Budd defends her Featherweight World Title against Cris Cyborg.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Known for their impressive fast finishes, 'Easy' Ed Ruth meets undefeated Yaroslav Amosov in anything but an easy fight as the two face off in the welterweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator 242: Bandejas vs Pettis
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back from the Mohegan Sun Arena with a night of fast-paced action as Sergio Pettis battles Ricky Bandejas in a bantamweight title-elimination fight, while Jason Jackson clashes with dangerous veteran Jordan Mein at welterweight.

programme.title: Bellator 243: Chandler vs Henderson II
programme.desc: Former MMA World Champions Michael Chandler and Benson Henderson look to settle things once and for all after their first unforgettable battle ended in a razor-thin split decision in Chandler’s favor.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In her first nationally-televised interview, Angelique, 20, breaks her silence about a sinister plot she says she thwarted that almost claimed her life -- and that of her unborn baby.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Husband James says he's fighting for custody of his four children alleging his estranged wife, Jennifer, is controlled by a religious group. Jennifer developed an attachment to the ministry's leader, Doug Perry, of The Fellowship of the Martryrs (FOTM).

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee's husband, Kirby, made headlines after she videotaped him spanking her with a wooden spoon. What made Renee decide to record it and turn Kirby in to police? Is there any chance of saving this marriage? Plus, updates on some memorable former guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2008, Julia was a single mom, homeless, & living in a car with daughters, Olivia, 15, Phoebe,12, & Olivia's newborn daughter. Her children entered foster care. Olivia's baby was adopted. This family seeks Dr. Phil's advice on reversing adoption. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Best known for his dramatic weight loss, the former Subway pitchman was outed for sexual misconduct. Now, audio tapes detail Fogle's troubling conversations about children, sex and possibly using a child's party to lure victims.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Danielle & Brandon are in a custody war over their little daughter. Mom Danielle has visitation, & says her ex has threatened to kill her twice. Dad Brandon says Danielle is a terrible mother concerned with her 'nonexistent' acting/singing career. Pt. 1

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dad’s admitted to shoplifting, drugging, now he’s moved in his mistress & Mom sleeps on the couch!

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Laurie-Ann claims ex held her hostage; he says she's lying after being dumped.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Two teenage girls go hiking in the woods, never to return. In their final moments, did these friends record images of their killer?

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A woman says her fiancé made the decision to identify as Goose Wayne Batman.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Former students share experiences of alleged abuse at Hephzibah House Christian boarding school for girls.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Investigation of vanished Idaho children whose mother, Lori Vallow, shows no concern while in Hawaii.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampetts decide they want to go home for Possum Day, Mr. Drysdale attempts to put together a Possum Day in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks the Drysdale's young attractive maid is interested in him. He commences to courting her but she is actually interested in watching the football game on the Clampett's color TV.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's concocts a love potion for Elly Mae at the same time Mr. Drysdale hires an escort for Elly. Dean arrives at the mansion with the Clampetts believing he's Miss Jane's boyfriend so Granny tries a reverse spell.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Lucas Sebastian, a billionaire entrepreneur, wants Jed to invest in his new venture, undersea farming.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Farquar, Mrs. Drysdale's father comes for a visit. When he's alone with Drysdale, he reveals he's broke. It seems on his way over, he passed through Las Vegas and lost his whole fortune and is asking Drysdale for a handout, which he refuses.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants to be a general and Mr. Drysdale decides the safest idea is to get him into a boys military academy. With Jethro twice the size of the other boys, the commander has his doubts while a mock battle confuses Granny and Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale is unhappy with Dr. Clyburn's treatment of his cold the Clampetts hear about it. Granny decides it's time to set up practice and enlists the rest of her family to help. She also claims a cure for the common cold.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The world's richest woman wants to buy the Clampett mansion and will stop at nothing to get it. Will Jed finally sell?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to learn to drive the truck but can't get used to modern day contraptions. A horse is more of what she wants and Mr. Drysdale gets her one, a professional race horse.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Granny hears the Drysdales are at a horse show, she declares she wants good trotter so she can ride it to the market. When Mr. Drysdale buys a racer along with a buggy, Granny decides she wants to be the driver at the track.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny encounters an ostrich at the Drysdales and believe it's a giant chicken. She decides it got into her "medicinal tonic" and that's why it's so big. She tries to apply the idea to her vegetables.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts believe resuming his courtship of Elly is why Sonny Drysdale returns. His stepfather arranges a job as a beauty product salesman and his sixth stop at the Clampetts is where his merchandise is mistaken as courting gifts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny, along with Elly, is heading back to the hills to do some doctoring. Mr. Drysdale is frantic to stop her so he reveals that the Brewsters are having a baby. Jethro brings home some girls from the Kit Kat Club so he won't be lonely.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A shady magician sells his wares to the gullible Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed thinks Granny needs help in cleaning the mansion, but she believes it's because he wants to put her in a retirement home, so Granny is ready to head to the hills with her money, which Mr. Drysdale is desperate to avoid.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is bent on becoming an astronaut but gets sidetracked into teaming up with Miss Jane to become a folk singer. Along the way, Jethro invents a new musical device he dubs the Bodine o' phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale, at first irate that beautiful actress Bergstrom is kept on an expensive stipend without making a film, is smitten at first sight and so places the actress in the Clampett home to learn backwoods accents and ways for a movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro becomes a Hugh Hefner wannabe when he discovers some Playpen magazines in Mr. Drysdale's garage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny remains eager to get Elly to the altar and decides Professor Biddle, Miss Jane's friend, will do. Mr. Drysdale blackmails Dash into asking the Clampett lass for a date. The meek birdwatcher and the handsome actor are soon at odds.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny brews a batch of her tonic hoping it helps Elly get a husband. Jane and Mr. Biddle are trying to hatch a condor egg but a sip of the potion changes the birdwatcher's focus and the Clampetts need to get him out of a tree.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny receives a box from Cousin Pearl in the hills. One of the items in the box is an old-fashioned crank telephone. Granny asks Jethro to hook it up to a party line on the pole, so she can listen in on the party line

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny despairs of Elly Mae ever finding a husband and decides to promote her non-existent cooking skills. She is entered into a TV show cook-off, but nothing she fixes is edible.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly returns from a modeling stint in New York. Donna enjoys her summer with Ray, who has made an effort to make up for his past mistakes.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna, Kelly, Clare and Valerie try out for the Tournament of Roses Court. Brandon and Susan cover the Rose Court tryouts for the newspaper, and attend the party together. Toni surprises Dylan when they go motorcycle riding.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie is haunted by nightmares about her father's suicide. David learns that his mother requires shock therapy to improve her chances of recovery. Toni throws a dinner party while her father is out of town.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie gets herself invited on a road trip with Kelly, Donna and Clare. Steve convinces Brandon to let a director film a movie at the Walsh house. Marchette tells Toni that Dylan is using her.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie accepts her marketing professor's invitation to a seminar. Bruno delivers a letter from Dylan to Toni. Steve and Clare quarrel after booking a motel room. Donna resists Ray's relentless attempts at a reconciliation.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: A fortune teller sets up shop at the Peach Pit for Halloween. In spite of her questionable credibility, her presence has an impact on many couples.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dylan asks Toni to marry him. An earthquake rocks the major Los Angeles area, spooking Colin. Donna sees her mother in a photograph of the 1969 Rose Court contestants, but Felice refuses to explain herself.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: The guys kidnap Dylan for his bachelor party. The girls throw a much wilder time for bride-to-be Toni.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna makes the Rose Court, and her mother reveals her reasons for not supporting her in the pageant.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Colin and Susan leave for New York to spend Thanksgiving with their families. The gang decides to spend the holiday together, and David invites his mother to join them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Joe rejects a plea bargain and decides to go to trial. The Associated Press picks up Brandon's story about the trial for nationwide syndication. Colin babysits for Erin while Kelly and David are at the trial.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna fills in for Lisa at a convenience store. A young boy is caught stealing a teddy bear for his brother's birthday, but Donna covers for him. Brandon alienates Nat and Susan as he gets carried away during the After Dark's charity casino night.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Cindy surprises Brandon by coming to visit for Christmas. Joe tries to keep an antsy Donna in suspense about her Christmas/birthday present.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly's father swoops into town, and once again sweeps her off of her feet with promises of a relationship. Nat is reunited with an old-flame.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Reid descubre que su novia fue secuestrada por su acosador, él y el equipo de la UAC se reúnen para encontrarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo son llamados cuando un par de niños tropiezan con el cuerpo de un marine desaparecido en un lago helado. Mientras el equipo busca pistas en el lecho helado del lago, se topan con otros tres cadáveres acribillados a balazos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y su equipo son llamados cuando una criptógrafa del Pentágono sospechosa de espionaje aparentemente se suicida. Con su principal sospechoso muerto, el equipo del NCIS debe descubrir si era o no el topo del Pentágono.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Tras descubrir que la escena de un espeluznante asesinato había sido montada, el equipo se da cuenta de que Abby era el objetivo previsto cuando unas pruebas clave contaminan su laboratorio y casi la matan.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Ziva queda en estado de shock cuando una táctica rutinaria que utiliza para someter a un sospechoso podría ser la causa de su repentina muerte. Mientras Ducky y Abby trabajan para limpiar el nombre de Ziva.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Negocios personales
programme.desc: Después de que Emily Harrison (Danielle Savre) le dice a Danny y Baez que teme que su ex novio abusivo vuelva a comportarse de la misma manera con su nueva novia, Emily se convierte en la principal sospechosa cuando él es asesinado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños rituales de asesinato conducen al equipo en busca del asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al sur para investigar a un veloz asesino cuya firma coincide con la de un asesino en serie de hace 30 años. Además, el equipo descubre que alguien los sigue e imita los crímenes que ya han resuelto.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Reid descubre que su novia fue secuestrada por su acosador, él y el equipo de la UAC se reúnen para encontrarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen being driven backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several squad cars join together in pursuit of a pickup truck. Officers conduct a drug raid utilizing percussion grenades. A suspect wanted for numerous robberies flees from police in a sports car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer shows up as Coco the Clown in an undercover sting. The Vice unit conducts a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspected “johns.”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A remorseful woman is arrested for lewd conduct during Mardi Gras. Police officers are dispatched into the busy streets of New Orleans during the super bowl in search of ticket scalpers. Police Department investigates a theft at a local store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. During Mardi Gras officers arrest a man pickpocketing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A Special Operations Unit coordinates a city-wide “buy bust” sting designed to apprehend street level drug dealers. Officers join units in pursuit of a stolen SUV. An officer arrests two brothers for public intoxication.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic accident where a man ran his truck through a wall. An undercover officer poses as a “john” hoping to attract unsuspecting prostitutes. A vehicle is stopped due to a missing license plate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract interested “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer decides to check out a local bar where a lot of illegal activity takes place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Detectives stop a vehicle leaving a known drug house and find a loaded concealed gun while searching one of the passengers. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers set up a sting designed to capture unsuspecting bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a routine traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer pulls over a vehicle after observing a suspected prostitute enter the vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a routine traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers and residents systematically retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. A police department conducts a drug-reversal-buy sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers attempt to pull over a suspect who was reported to have been involved in a car-jacking. A suspect is caught in the act of burying a bag filled with illegal prescription drugs. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bewildered driver claims that he did not see the lights or hear the sirens when he was signaled to stop. Officers investigate a call regarding a suspicious parked car. A manager of an apartment complex is assaulted by their intoxicated tenants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sibling reluctantly called authorities when his belligerent brother refused to leave his mother's home. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local grocery store. Officers investigate a suspicious vehicle parked at a local gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer coordinates a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspects who solicit prostitutes. An inebriated man is detained until he sobers up. Officers stop a vehicle which was reported stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter an unusual situation where the victim and suspect have barricaded themselves inside the house. Officers respond to a domestic dispute at a nearby apartment complex. A man explains how his ex-girlfriend climbed into his window.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young girl may be the victim of a sexual assault. An officer spots a speeding motorcycle and attempts a routine stop. Officers serve a violation of domestic violence warrant on an inebriated guest at a local hotel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The lead suspect for the high-profile murder of anti-drug crusading assemblyman Danilo Zamesca is Thomas Simon, the west coast's biggest drug supplier.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Catherine and Keppler begin to investigate the murder of a teen-aged Jane Doe, both agree that the killer, who was meticulous in removing evidence from the body and its surrounding area, is likely a repeat offender.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A case involving a man's torched corpse whose bones and tissues had been harvested leads Nick and Keppler into the disturbing world of illegally sold human body parts.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom returns from his teaching sabbatical as new member of the team, Michael Keppler desperately tries to keep his dark past hidden from his colleagues.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: With potentially less than a day to attempt to prevent the next murders, the CSI team must quickly shake off their shock that the true miniature killer is not the late Ernie Edward Dell, who committed suicide after confessing to the slayings.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom's quip that two missing young lovers may have run off to Mexico is soon quashed by the discovery of drops of blood by the boy's vacant parking spot at the high school.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While processing the house where several showgirls were murdered, Sara is haunted by the terrified eyes and cryptic dying words of the sixth victim she discovers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg is forced to again contend with the hostile mother and brother of the hoodlum he killed in self-defense several months ago when the CSI team discovers that the brother is involved in a new murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Grissom and the rest of the CSIs are out investigating new cases, Hodges leads Archie, Henry, Mandy and Wendy to believe that Grissom wants them to secretly band together that evening in an attempt to solve the four miniature killer cases.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: In their attempt to identify the murderer of a has-been boxer who lived among a group of prostitutes who detested him, the CSIs must establish which of several life-threatening acts against him in one night actually killed him.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a blackjack dealer whose estranged husband has ties to a club of UFO believers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is uneasy about Grissom being reunited with Lady Heather during the CSIs' investigation of her attempted murder by a client she refuses to name.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As the CSI team comes closer than ever to identifying the miniature killer, Sara mysteriously goes missing, forcing her relationship with Grissom out into the open.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara's fate remains in question as the CSI team rushes to find out if she survived an attack by the miniature killer, on the eighth season premiere.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: The Doors
programme.desc: Jim Morrison, una de las figuras más sensuales en la historia del rock and roll, explota en la pantalla en “THE DOORS”, la electrizante película sobre los años sesenta y un descarriado que sacudió la conciencia de Estados Unidos – para siempre.

programme.title: Guerra de razas
programme.desc: Inspirado en hechos reales. Para evitar que terroristas nacionales construyan una bomba sucia, un agente del FBI (Daniel Radcliffe) se infiltra en un grupo extremista, haciéndose pasar por uno de ellos.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: El santo
programme.desc: ¿Busca a alguien que pueda infiltrarse en una organización súper secreta o robar una fórmula científica que podría cambiar el mundo? Por el precio justo, el Santo es el indicado.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: Una lección de vida Griffin y Phoenix
programme.desc: La fuerza de vivir es una historia de amor conmovedora y gracioso entre dos personas que se enfrentan a un obstáculo aparentemente insuperable que puede interponerse entre ellos y la última oportunidad que tienen para encontrar el amor.

programme.title: Pequeñas grandes amigas
programme.desc: Molly es una princesa fiestera cuyo dinero acaba de agotarse. Ray es una niña quisquillosa cuya niñera acaba de salir huyendo. Cuando Molly es contratada para cuidar de Ray, se forma la combinación perfecta para que ambas chicas cambien sus vidas.

programme.title: Serendipity ES
programme.desc: En el transcurso de una noche mágica, Jonathan (John Cusack) y Sara (Kate Beckinsale) se conocen de manera inesperada, luego cada uno se va por su lado, dejando que el destino guíe su futuro, si es que se supone que terminen juntos.

programme.title: Shaft
programme.desc: Para detener a un asesino racista, Shaft tiene que rastrear al único testigo que puede dejarlo tras las rejas. Shaft se acerca a la par del peligro.

programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Angelina Jolie reinventa al héroe de acción moderno en la película Lara Croft: Tomb Raider. Lara Croft nació dentro de la opulencia y fue educada en las escuelas más exclusivas

programme.desc: Lara Croft viaja por todo el mundo en busca de la legendaria Caja de Pandora. Si Lara fracasa y la caja cae en manos de los criminales Jonathan Reiss y Chen Lo, millones de personas morirán.

programme.title: Contacto sangriento
programme.desc: El maestro de Ninjutsu Frank Dux viaja a Hong Kong para participar en el Kumite, las olimpiadas de artes marciales, y conoce a una hermosa periodista estadounidense. Al poco tiempo deberá enfrentarse a Chong-Li, un despiadado maestro coreano de taekwondo.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Aqui Entre Nos (LAS)
programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.title: Especies III
programme.desc: A medida que su especie se extingue por infecciones y enfermedades, una alienígena seductora inmunológicamente más fuerte se convierte en la única esperanza para que sigan viviendo.

programme.title: Especies: el despertar
programme.desc: Helena Mattsson y Ben Cross protagonizan esta aterradora continuación acerca de una sobrina y su tío que destapan la verdad de sus raíces alienígenas como consecuencia de una oleada de masacres. Dirigida por Nick Lyon.

programme.title: Estación zombi
programme.desc: Una desgarradora película de terror y suspenso zombi, que sigue a un grupo de pasajeros aterrorizados que se abren camino a través de un brote viral en todo el país.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: Una joven manifiesta estigmas como los que Jesucristo sufrió en su cricifixión. Ni médicos ni psiquiatras pueden darle ninguna explicación, sólo un sacerdote enviado por el Vaticano la ayudará, aunque tenga que ir en contra de algunas de sus creencias.

programme.title: Perturbados
programme.desc: Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) le advierte al recién llegado Steve (James Marsden) sobre el Blue Ribbons, un club de estudiantes robóticos y perfectos que dominan la escuela. Cuando Gavin se vuelve perfecto, Steve y Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigan.

programme.title: La hija de la luz
programme.desc: Con rasgos que rememoran al sexto sentido y la profecía llega este fascinante thriller sobrenatural lleno de escalofríos y un gran suspenso.

programme.title: Piraña 3D
programme.desc: Un terremoto en Arizona abre una fisura en el fondo del lago Havasu, liberando decenas de pirañas prehistóricas que aterrorizan a la ciudad cercana.

programme.title: Locos por el juego
programme.desc: Un famoso jugador de bolos con una carrera "cortada" prematuramente quiere llevar a un nuevo prodigio al éxito.

programme.title: Tómalo con calma
programme.desc: John Travolta regresa como Chili Palmer en esta película, así que "Tómalo con calma". Con un reparto lleno de estrellas como Uma Thurman y The Rock, esta película cuenta la cómica historia de un mafioso que quiere ser un gigante de la música.

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: In & Out
programme.desc: Howard es un profesor de literatura y está a punto de casarse, pero todo se complica cuando uno de sus ex-alumnos gana un Oscar y se lo dedica a su “profesor homosexual”.

programme.desc: Hud Bannon (Paul Newman) is the rebellious son of a respectable rancher who’s continually at odds with his aging father. Patricia Neal and Melvyn Douglas co-star, in their Oscar®-winning roles.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.desc: Jimmy Stewart plays the bungling but charming big-city lawyer determined to rid the fair village of Shinbone of its number one nuisance and bad man: Liberty Valance.

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: An athletic father tries to press his hypochondriac teenage son to follow in his footsteps.

programme.desc: In this zany farce, Harvey is a shy but talented pro golfer who, because he can't face the crowds, coaxes his buddy Joe into a big-time tournament. As Joe's caddy, Harvey is a disaster, and the two have a hilarious quarrel.

programme.desc: A goonish young man receives telepathic top secret information in his nightmares, which are used by his artist friend in comic strips. Foreign agents and the CIA get interested.

programme.desc: A rich momma's boy returns west with the son of his murdered father's partner to foil a gang trying to gain control of his family ranch. They accidentally clean up the town.

programme.desc: Three World War II veterans return home to small-town America to discover that they and their families have been irreparably changed.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad, particularly the combat replacements, for the rigorous training he puts them through.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Business executive Mary Jane Hastings returns home to Hooterville and impresses everyone with her administrative ability, particularly her handling of men.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Shady Rest would stand a better chance of being selected as the site of the big convention if Kate were around, but she's trapped in a cave-in.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate is trying to get Shady Rest chosen as the site for a big convention, but a sprained ankle has incapacitated her and the job of cornering the convention is left to Uncle Joe and the daughters.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: When Adelaide "Genghis" Keane returns from Europe, Kate is surprised to find that the elderly schoolteacher is no longer the tyrannical disciplinarian she used to be.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo has a new friend - a little dog that keeps following her around. She'd like to keep the animal, but Kate says the animal must go.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate's friend, Elsie, comes to stay at Shady Rest while waiting to have her baby, and a nervous Uncle Joe immediately works out a master plan to get a doctor to Shady Rest when the time arrives.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe has grown extremely fond of pretty librarian Phyllis Marsh, who has set up a traveling library in the baggage car of the Hooterville Cannonball.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe sees an opportunity to close down the Hooterville Cannonball when he learns that an Indian tribe has legal title to the land the Cannonball's tracks are on.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Hooterville will have to go some to retain its record as the first community in the state to file election returns-- Crabwell Corners has got itself an automatic voting machine.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer holds a farewell dinner in a Chinese restaurant, not knowing it is a front for a gambling operation.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Two shyster lawyers try to get Gomer and Carter to file a false damage suit after a near miss from an automobile.

programme.desc: Carter and Duke use Gomer to expose a card cheat.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's love for Welsh rarebit causes him to sleepwalk -- and to tell off Carter.

programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) becomes enamored of Mr. Kimball (Alvy Moore), the county agent. However, though she feminizes herself and gets all gussied up, he refuses to go out with a girl named Ralph. Can Oliver solve the situation legally?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Six months is up! Now, Lisa (Eva Gabor) gets to decide whether she and Oliver (Eddie Albert) will remain on the farm or go back to New York and their Park Avenue lifestyle! Will this be the final straw for Green Acres?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Sam Drucker (Frank Cady) is leaving on a much-needed two-week vacation and talks Oliver (Eddie Albert) into assuming his duties as a deputy sheriff. But Oliver soon learns enforcing the law isn't quite as easy as it looks.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Whatever you do, don't say her name and especially while playing checkers down at Drucker's! An old hag named Molly Turgiss (Renie Riano), who died twenty years before the Douglases (Eddie Albert, Eva Gabor) came to town, might be haunting them.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a few days before Oliver (Eddie Albert)'s birthday, and Lisa (Eva Gabor) doesn't know quite what to get him…until the old Hoyt Clagwell goes kerflooey! So, she goes out and buys the biggest and fanciest tractor she can find.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Eb (Tom Lester) has a way with sick animals after Eb cures Arnold, the pig, and Alice, the chicken, and offers to put him through veterinary college. But will life in Green Acres ever be the same without Ed?!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: A horse follows Oliver (Eddie Albert) home, but every time he tries to show it to his wife, the horse disappears. Lisa (Eva Gabor) assumes that her husband is imagining things…and as more animals show up, Oliver begins to think so too.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) takes Oliver (Eddie Albert) to Pixley Superior Municipal Court and sues him for non-payment of a vital contract over the little matter of some rain…or lack thereof. Does Mr. Haney know who he's up against? Does Oliver?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Third-Tuesday-of-Every-Month-Culture-Committee of the Every-Other-Wednesday-Afternoon-Discussion-Club decides that Hooterville needs some culture in the form of a symphony orchestra. And Lisa (Eva Gabor) may just know the perfect conductor.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's (Eddie Albert) nephew Charles (Don Edmonds) arrives for a visit, and Oliver is completely shaken up when the boy turns out to be a long-haired, motorcycle-ridin', hippy-dippy type. But, boy, does he know a thing or two about engines.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones

programme.desc: Barnaby is hired by a South American President to find his son who lives in LA. He finds him but learns he is also the Rebel leader, Javier he is presently at odds with.

programme.desc: "Why are firms owned by virtuous Japanese-American Yuhio Muromoto being bombed by a WW2 memorabilia collector? McGarrett tries to uncover the truth.

programme.desc: A mystery writer examines strange occurrences in experiments with a cryogenics institute. (Cryogenics is the freezing of living material for preservation for future use.)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While fishing on his day off, Bubba Skinner's dog unearths a dead baby. The investigation leads to a mentally-challenged girl and her family who’s not interested in talking. Will they get past the family’s secrets to learn the truth about the baby?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Having served his time, Prosper Hoag is on parole and back home in Sparta. The folks in town will never forget the accident he caused that resulted in the death of three children and permanent injuries to two others, but will they forgive him?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve meets up with his young protégé, Tommy Allen, but is ready to strangle him when he finds out that Tommy was involved in another brawl, this time at BBQ Bob's!

programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s the star of Degrassi’s first-ever football game win! The Shep is floored at how much Riley’s improved.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare stands up for Connor when he receives unfair treatment from The Shep. The result of their peaceful protest? Detentions for everyone. No one is more frustrated by the detention than Alli. It wasn’t her idea to protest.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Shep has returned after his sensitivity training and it’s Spirit Week at Degrassi! However spirits are anything but high at home for Jane as she struggles to get her dropout brother Lucas off the couch.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s tired of being referred to as Kelly’s girlfriend and Blonde Emma – she’s not even blonde anymore! Determined to create a distinct university identity, Emma borrows some pot that was gifted to Kelly and smokes up with Becca and Gwyneth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli wants Johnny to like her, a lot. She worries she’s going to lose him to an older more “experienced” girl so to make sure she keeps her man close, Alli decides to play with the big kids at a ravine party.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high at Degrassi with exams approaching and course selections due for next term.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Blue asks Holly J to the winter dance in a very romantic way. Only problem? Holly J thinks she might have a thing for her co-worker, Spinner. While Blue is a dreamboat, Spinner is a goofball.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Mia is offered a MAJOR modeling contract in Paris, Peter decides he’ll go with her. But he soon realizes he doesn’t fit into her sophisticated world.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Peter discovers his recreational drug was not-so-recreational meth, he swears he’ll never touch the stuff again. But with the reality of coming down, Peter realizes he just wants more.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Club Fair Day and Alli and Clare sign up for the Photography Club. Watch out Annie Leibovitz! Everyone who’s anyone is getting involved in something – except Johnny.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Spinner have been through so much together. They’re best friends. Jane’s just come out of a difficult year at home, so hanging out with Spinner is safe and… easy. That’s not a bad thing, right?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli insists she’s done with Johnny. When she breaks into his locker to steal nude photos of herself back, she, in fact, realizes that she’s so not over him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Holly J team up for a practicum business assignment and immediately bond over their idea to start a babysitting agency.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: News travels fast about Riley and Sam’s big fight. Riley doesn’t think much of it – until rumours start spreading that Sam was gay-bashed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: In Australia 65,000 years ago, the first human explorers face a land populated with giant lizards, killer rhino-like creatures and deadly birds.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Scarlioni is planning to steal the Mona Lisa. Yet he has six in his cellar - all genuine.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Count Scarlioni is really Scaroth, last of the Jagaroth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Scaroth intends to travel back in time to save his own people from destruction.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Gun-runners are on Androzani Minor, supplying the rebellious android-builder Sharez Jek.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Salateen tells Peri and the Doctor they are dying from spectrox tomaemia.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Jek believes Peri will fall in love with him and the Doctor is caught by the gunrunners.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Morgus is ruined, and Jek goes on a murderous rampage.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Tardis materializes on what appears to be an Edwardian racing yacht.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Turlough tries to commit suicide to escape the influence of the Black Guardian.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that the captain of the pirate ship is actually a concentrated beam of mental energy.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor manages to eject Wrack and pilot her vessel to victory.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: While under the influence of the evil Mara, Tegan re-directs the Tardis to the Mara's former home planet.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor begins to unravel the legend of the Little Mind's Eye crystal; Tegan remains under the Mara's control as it attempts to regain its hold over the planet Manussa.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Chela takes the Doctor's fears seriously and tells him the snakedancer Dojjin can aid him in defeating the Mara.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and the original snakedancer Dojeen work to rid the planet of the malign Mara once and for all, but it has the whole of Manussa in its psychic grip now.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands on Varos.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Mistaken for rebels, the Doctor and Peri learn that Sil is making a bid to rule Varos.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor inadvertently ruins a game.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor must participate in a game.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Second Doctor and Jamie visit space station Camera to speak to the scientist Dastari.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Peri meet Jamie and learn the Second Doctor is with the Sontarans on Earth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Sixth Doctor meets the Second Doctor but events soon overtake them.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Peri arrive in the mining village of Killingworth in 19th century England.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master seeks the finest brains of the Industrial Revolution to increase his power.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar visits Tijuana, Mexico, to team up with volunteers from United Hope for Animals, an organization that rescues dogs and finds them U.S. homes; a cocker spaniel taunts her owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan investigates the case of a bulldog named Bella who has become aggressive ever since her owner's five-month rehab stint.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A professional dog groomer reaches out to Cesar for help with three of her toughest clients; Cesar helps a couple with their head-strong pitbull.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Puppy mills produce millions of dogs; Ceaser works with an animal rights group to rescue and rehabilitate some pups.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan helps Suzie Dove Miles, who has recently adopted a Doberman who is fearful of literally everything.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Family dogs brawl with each other; a dog torments a child; a five-legged miniature pinscher has an aggressive attitude.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar attempts to introduce Roscoe, an agoraphobic Akita who is too scared to leave the house and garden and has never been for a walk, to the outside world.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Weimaraner eats everything in sight; a yellow Lab's excess energy is expressed destructively; an Australian shepherd is unable to socialize with other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Three canines with issues at a dog-friendly ad agency office; a border collie mix becomes excited and unresponsive to commands when in her owner's truck.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Velvet Revolver drummer Matt Sorum's French bulldog goes crazy at the sight of other dogs; Cesar helps a former therapy dog with aggression issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A woman who has relinquished the role of pack leader to her Welsh Sealyham terrier; an English mastiff with too much energy; a Tibetan terrier who is a terror on walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Great Dane with an aggressive attitude; Cesar helps a shepherd mix recover from the issues developed while living in a hoarding situation so she can be rehomed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar adopts four puppies and films them living with him and his pack for their first eight months to demonstrate how to raise a balanced dog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive lab-mastiff mix; a Jack Russell mix that barks obsessively; a woman is concerned at her dog's habit of barking and growling at people.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven tells Claudia he spent the night with Ted; Krystle leaves Blake; seeing Ted embrace his son, Blake strikes him; Steven accuses his father of murder.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake must stand trial for the murder of Steven's lover; Krystle returns home to be with Blake. Fallon testified in her father's behalf but Steven refutes her statements in court.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: On the witness stand, Blake maintains his innocence; Matthew learns of Claudia's affair with Steven; Claudia and daughter Lindsay are involved in an automobile accident; The prosecution calls in a mysterious witness that Blake is surprised to see.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake's first wife Alexis testifies that Blake is capable of violence; Matthew takes off with Lindsay; Alexis tells Steven of her love for him; the jury announces they have reached a verdict.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake is found guilty; Krystle reunites with her husband; Blake strikes Steven; a pregnant Krystle suffers a fall; Alexis moves onto the Carrington estate.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle orders Alexis from the mansion; Blake instructs his attorney to cut Steven out of his will; Claudia attempts suicide; Alexis tells Steven that he is Blake's only child.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis tells Cecil Colby that Fallon is his daughter; Blake and Steven are urged to reconcile; Dr. Toscanni pulls an unconscious Steven from the pool and rushes him to the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven returns to the mansion to recover from injuries sustained by his fall; Krystle's niece, Sammy Jo, arrives to spend a few weeks with the Carrigtons; Alexis hires a private investigator to delve into Krystle's past.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick reveals to his sister that Blake is responsible for the death of their younger brother; Sammy Jo and Steven spend the night together; Alexis shoots at Krystle's horse, causing her to be thrown to the ground and hospitalized.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle loses her baby; Steven and Sammy Jo begin dating, although Steven is in love with Claudia. Fallon continues her affair with Nick, and is jealous to find him visiting Krystle in the hospital.

programme.desc: When his cover gets blown, a Hong Kong cop (Wu Jing) lands in a Thai prison where the warden works with a criminal mastermind (Louis Koo) to harvest organs.

programme.title: Paradox
programme.desc: When his daughter goes missing, a police negotiator (Louis Koo) teams with local police (Tony Jaa) to find her, but instead finds himself embroiled in a web of corruption and violence in this explosive thriller from director Wilson Yip.

programme.title: Triple Threat
programme.desc: This breakneck thriller teams over half a dozen of the world’s biggest action stars for the martial arts event film of the year. When a hit is taken out on a billionaire’s daughter, it’s mercenaries versus assassins in an all-out war.

programme.title: Ong Bak
programme.desc: Raised by monks who taught him the Thai martial art of muay thai, Ting (Tony Jaa) is sent to Bangkok to retrieve the stolen head of the town's statue of the Buddha.

programme.title: Ong Bak 2: The Beginning
programme.desc: Tony Jaa stars in this epic tale of revenge set hundreds of years in the past. This prequel to Ong-Bak: The Thai Warrior takes Jaa's skills to the next level, showcasing him as a master of a wide range of martial arts styles.

programme.title: Skin Trade
programme.desc: Detective Nick Cassidy (Dolph Lundgren) goes to Bangkok after Viktor Dragovic (Ron Perlman), the human trafficker who killed his family. Agent Eddie Reed is sent to bring Nick home, and Thai detective Tony Vitayakui questions Nick's motives.

programme.title: Kill Zone 2
programme.desc: When his cover gets blown, a Hong Kong cop (Wu Jing) lands in a Thai prison where the warden works with a criminal mastermind (Louis Koo) to harvest organs.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a popular young man, investigators faced the daunting task of searching for one boat among 1200 others.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files
